description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa upholstered in a glossy, brown leather material, giving it a rich and slightly reflective appearance. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which are loose and generously filled for comfort. The armrests are wide, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's geometric silhouette. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, maintaining a clean and minimalist look. No visible legs are present, as the base extends directly to the floor, creating a solid, block-like profile. The overall design is contemporary and robust, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A glossy brown leather sofa with a boxy, modern design, featuring wide armrests and loose, plush cushions. The base is solid and extends to the floor, giving it a sturdy, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two loose back cushions, and wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back and the continuous base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a continuous block extending to the floor, giving a grounded, solid appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation, matching the height of the armrests and supporting two loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown leather with a glossy finish and subtle natural leather texture; no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
